settings.title: Singles // Add to your Doctrine or wear daily

settings.text:
THE REMNANT [No. 01] – For those who won’t kneel when everyone else does.
FAFO [No. 02] – For when polite stopped getting the job done.
WE THE PEOPLE [No. 03] – For patriots who still take the preamble literally.

We didn’t start this company to sell clothes. We started it because we were tired of watching rights disappear behind red tape.

Forefather Threads was born in Waynedale, Indiana. Forged over late-night whiskey and uncomfortable truths.

We are not here to compromise. We are not here to fit in. We are the Remnant.

custom_css: /* Finds the bold text in the last paragraph and turns it White */.image-with-text__text p:last-child strong,.rte p:last-child strong {color: #ffffff !important; font-weight: 900 !important;}
/* Adds a glow and pop effect to the Red Button on hover */.button {transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease;}
.button:hover {/* Simulates brightness by adding a light white tint */ box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 100px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2); transform: scale(1.05); /* Grows slightly larger */}
